name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Magiquest
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends a MagiQuest wand code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Wand ID
config_entries.description: The wand ID to send, as a hex integer. See the dumper output for your wand ID.

config_entries.label: Magnitude
config_entries.description: The magnitude of swishes and swirls the wand should transmit. See the dumper output for examples. If omitted, sends 0xFFFF (which the real wand never uses).
